channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Ongoing problem of Fly tipping, 15th March
item.description:
More rubbish dumped on side of the street. From the address on the side of a package does not seem to be local.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Lee Conservancy Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Very big pot holes on this road they are dangerously big, 15th March
item.description:
There are many big pot holes one this road they are dangerously big could give you a blow out if not seen and course you to crash need fixing ASP
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Crossway, Thamesmead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Mapesbury Road close to Exeter Road., 15th March
item.description:
Since this evening, Sunday 15th March 2026 streetlight number 30 is not working.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Mapesbury Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Unpleasant rubbish, 15th March
item.description:
Bottles cans detritus Stuck together with leaves. Along Selby Road especially in gutter but also on pavement

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 48, Selby Road, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Significantly growing flytipping, 15th March
item.description:
An incident of flytipping on corner of Manor Mount and Waldenshaw Road has, as left uncollected, grown significant. It now numbers dozens of items and a number of metres wide in size. Sadly no visible attempt by Lewisham Council to clear up despite multiple reports by many neighbours over the last month.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Waldenshaw Road, Forest Hill, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Drug and alcohol waste in communal garden, 15th March
item.description:
Extensive litter including drug and alcohol waste in communal garden from person entering and littering since start feb
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Elmington Road, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Congreve Road, 15th March
item.description:
Poorly maintained green areas and hedges- litter,leaves taking over the pavement, dry vegetation,litter everywhere

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Congreve Road, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Broken paving slab near James Stroud House entrance, 15th March
item.description:
One of the paving slabs immediately next to the entrance to James Stroud house had been broken and collapsed. It is a clear and dangerous hazard for anyone accessing the block of flats especially as it is the first slab next to the step up to the entrance. It needs to be replaced to avoid potential injury.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Date Street, Walworth, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: More litter, 15th March
item.description:
Litter and leaves on pavement-All Congreve Road from top of Well Hall Road all the way to junction Congreve Road/Rochester Way and on green areas too -glass and plastic bottles/cans/take away wraps/

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Congreve Road, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pot hole, 15th March
item.description:
Deep vertical lip on one side hazard to cyclists

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Woolwich Church Street, Woolwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter, 15th March
item.description:
Litter has been left for months,from top of Congreve starting from convenience stores all the way down to Rochester Way,litter on pavements and road

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Congreve Road, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Huge pothole, 15th March
item.description:
There is a huge pothole on this roundabout. I have seen it has been reported numerous times over the last month but nothing has been done. It is getting bigger. You cannot go round it , and as it's so big going over it means it could damage your tyres. This needs sorting as soon as possible.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 123, Towncourt Lane, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Speeding cars on my road. Need to slow them down., 15th March
item.description:
People drive ridiculously fast around the bend on my street. I want speed bumps put on the bend and more 20mph signage on the street. It's just a matter of time before someone gets hurt in an accident or animals get killed due to speeding cars.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Mandeville Road, Brunswick Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Double yellow blips blocking driveway, 15th March
item.description:
Happens every evening between 20:30 and 22:00. Outside of hours to call.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kyverdale Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bins blocking footpath, 15th March
item.description:
2 large industrial bins have been dumped on footpath for over a week blocking access to wheelchairs and prams and forcing pedestrians into the street.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Laban Walk, Deptford
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Privet Hedge Needs Heavy Pruning, 15th March
item.description:
The hedge on the Betts Park side of the boundary with Seymour Terrace needs cutting back to match the height of the metal railing. (There is a special covenant in the park deeds that state this partition must not exceed 4ft). Cutting will reduce it roughly by half and allow more light to the PROW in the park, improving security, and open Seymour Terrace hopefully reducing refuse and fly-tipping.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 4, Seymour Terrace, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Road markings completely worm away, 15th March
item.description:
Road markings including the turn right box and cheverons have completely worn away, many near misses as drivers are using what's barely visably left of the turning box but have oncoming traffic driving right through the box, witnessed a few very close calls as drivers heading west aren't seeing the box that drivers are tuning into to turn into Tesco
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Edgington Way, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Blue graffiti, 15th March
item.description:
Blue graffiti on gray electrical box next to Vicarage grove street sign

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Camberwell Church Street, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping and dumped gas canisters, 15th March
item.description:
Hello - please can the dumped waste and gas/chemical canisters be removed swiftly. Not only are they an eyesore, but potentially a safety risk.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Westbourne Park, 96 Great Western Rd, Graffiti is on Door of Fmr Granada School of Motoring, 15th March
item.description:
Westbourne Park, 96 Great Western Rd, Graffiti is on Door of Fmr Granada School of Motoring

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Great Western Road, Kensal Town, City of Westminster
Report on FixMyStreet
